name_cn:
M24611 M24990
This Low Key Shoulder Bag handbag reaffirms the brand's exquisite craftsmanship with a magnificent design. Soft calfskin is dyed in a calm tone, while an adjustable shoulder strap and suede lining create a sophisticated atmosphere. The classic LV lock ensures your belongings are safe.
26 x 18 x 7 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
